## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would break existing functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update

## How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes.

**Test configuration**:
- Script used: `script.txt`
- Command: `python make_video.py ...`
- Result: [e.g. video generated successfully]

## Checklist:

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project (no comments)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have tested with a full video generation pipeline
- [ ] New and existing tests pass
